languages.text: "Ваша Светлость! Срочное донесение с Заркова. У одного из малых поселений на нижних уровнях обнаружили чужеродные руины. Разведчики попытались пробраться внутрь и нарвались на врага: из темных залов вылезли ужасающие железные {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}ксеносы{/g} с длинными когтями. Ваши воины доблестно отражали их натиск, пока не случилось непредвиденное — объявились другие железные ксеносы, без когтей, и, вместо того чтобы помочь своим сородичам, они принялись их уничтожать".

traits.locale_text: "Ваша Светлость! Срочное донесение с Заркова. У одного из малых поселений на нижних уровнях обнаружили чужеродные руины. Разведчики попытались пробраться внутрь и нарвались на врага: из темных залов вылезли ужасающие железные {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}ксеносы{/g} с длинными когтями. Ваши воины доблестно отражали их натиск, пока не случилось непредвиденное — объявились другие железные ксеносы, без когтей, и, вместо того чтобы помочь своим сородичам, они принялись их уничтожать".

languages.text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! An urgent dispatch from Zarkov. Xenos ruins have been discovered near a small settlement on the lower levels. Scouts attempted to penetrate them, but were met by the enemy: terrifying iron {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xenos{/g} with long claws emerged from the dark halls. Your soldiers valiantly repelled their assault until something unexpected occurred — other iron xenos appeared, without claws, and instead of aiding their own kind, they began to slaughter them."
languages.original_text: "Ваша Светлость! Срочное донесение с Заркова. У одного из малых поселений на нижних уровнях обнаружили чужеродные руины. Разведчики попытались пробраться внутрь и нарвались на врага: из темных залов вылезли ужасающие железные {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}ксеносы{/g} с длинными когтями. traits.locale_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! An urgent dispatch from Zarkov. At a small settlement on the lower levels, xenos ruins have been discovered. Scouts attempted to penetrate inside and were met by the enemy: from the dark halls emerged terrifying iron {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xenos{/g} with long claws. Your soldiers valiantly repelled their assault until the unforeseen occurred. Other iron xenos appeared, without claws, and instead of aiding their own kind, they began to slaughter them."

"Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! An urgent dispatch from Zarkov. Xenos ruins have been discovered near a small settlement on the lower levels. Scouts attempted to penetrate them, but were met by the enemy: terrifying iron {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xenos{/g} with long claws emerged from the dark halls. Your soldiers valiantly repelled their assault until something unexpected occurred — other iron xenos appeared, without claws, and instead of aiding their own kind, they began to slaughter them."

"Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! Urgent dispatch from Zarkov. Activity has been detected in the temple area where the metal monsters appeared. According to reports from the Merovian intelligence units, the metal creatures are there again... but now they are fighting the xenos that recently attacked Tsar-Cage."

"Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! Urgent dispatch from Zarkov. Activity has been detected in the temple area where the metal monsters appeared. According to reports from the Merovian intelligence units, the metal creatures are there again... but now they are fighting the {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xenos{/g} that recently attacked the Cage."

"Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! An urgent dispatch from Zarkov. At a small settlement on the lower levels, xenos ruins have been discovered. Scouts attempted to penetrate inside and were met by the enemy: from the dark halls emerged terrifying iron {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xenos{/g} with long claws. Your soldiers valiantly repelled their assault until the unforeseen occurred. Other iron xenos appeared, without claws, and instead of aiding their own kind, they began to slaughter them."

"Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! An urgent dispatch from Zarkov. Xenos ruins have been discovered near a small settlement on the lower levels. Scouts attempted to penetrate them, but were met by the enemy: terrifying iron {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xenos{/g} with long claws emerged from the dark halls. Your soldiers valiantly repelled their assault until something unexpected occurred — other iron xenos appeared, without claws, and instead of aiding their own kind, they began to slaughter them."

languages.text: 「御方様！ザルコフから緊急の電報です。金属怪獣が出現した寺院周辺で活動が確認されました。メロヴィアンの諜報部隊の報告によると、金属怪獣は再び現れている…しかし、今度はツァル・ケージを襲った異星人と戦っているようです」
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! Urgent dispatch from Zarkov. Activity has been detected in the temple area where the metal monsters appeared. According to reports from the Merovian intelligence units, the metal creatures are there again... but now they are fighting the xenos that recently attacked Tsar-Cage."

traits.locale_text: 「御方様！ザルコフから緊急の電報です。金属怪獣が出現した寺院周辺で活動が確認されました。メロヴィアンの諜報部隊の報告によると、金属怪獣は再び現れている…しかし、今度はツァル・ケージを襲った異星人と戦っているようです。」

languages.text: «¡Mi{mf|lord|lady}! Mensaje urgente desde Zarkov. Se han descubierto ruinas xenos cerca de un pequeño asentamiento en los niveles inferiores. Los exploradores intentaron entrar, pero fueron interrumpidos por el enemigo: unos espantosos {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xenos{/g} de metal con largas garras surgieron desde los oscuros pasadizos. Sus soldados rechazaron valientemente el ataque hasta que sucedió algo imprevisto: otros xenos de metal aparecieron, estos sin garras, y, en vez de ayudar a sus congéneres, empezaron a masacrarlos».
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! An urgent dispatch from Zarkov. Xenos ruins have been discovered near a small settlement on the lower levels. Scouts attempted to penetrate them, but were met by the enemy: terrifying iron {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xenos{/g} with long claws emerged from the dark halls. Your soldiers valiantly repelled their assault until something unexpected occurred — other iron xenos appeared, without claws, and instead of aiding their own kind, they began to slaughter them."

traits.locale_text: «¡Mi{mf|lord|lady}! Mensaje urgente desde Zarkov. Se han descubierto ruinas xenos cerca de un pequeño asentamiento en los niveles inferiores. Los exploradores intentaron entrar, pero fueron interrumpidos por el enemigo: unos espantosos {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xenos{/g} de metal con largas garras surgieron desde los oscuros pasadizos. Sus soldados rechazaron valientemente el ataque hasta que sucedió algo imprevisto: otros xenos de metal aparecieron, estos sin garras, y, en vez de ayudar a sus congéneres, empezaron a masacrarlos».

languages.text: “大人！扎尔科夫发来急报。在下层某个小定居点附近发现了异形遗迹。侦察兵试图深入调查，却遭遇敌人袭击：一群长着长长利爪的恐怖钢铁{g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}异形{/g}从黑暗大厅中涌了出来。士兵们英勇地击退了进攻，但随后发生了意外情况——另一批没有利爪的钢铁异形出现了，它们非但没有支援同类，反而开始屠杀它们。”
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! An urgent dispatch from Zarkov. Xenos ruins have been discovered near a small settlement on the lower levels. Scouts attempted to penetrate them, but were met by the enemy: terrifying iron {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xenos{/g} with long claws emerged from the dark halls. Your soldiers valiantly repelled their assault until something unexpected occurred — other iron xenos appeared, without claws, and instead of aiding their own kind, they began to slaughter them."

traits.locale_text: “大人！扎尔科夫发来急报。在下层某个小定居点附近发现了异形遗迹。侦察兵试图深入调查，却遭遇敌人袭击：一群长着长长利爪的恐怖钢铁{g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}异形{/g}从黑暗大厅中涌了出来。士兵们英勇地击退了进攻，但随后发生了意外情况——另一批没有利爪的钢铁异形出现了，它们非但没有支援同类，反而开始屠杀它们。”

languages.text: "Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}! Eine dringende Nachricht von Zarkov. Unweit einer kleinen Siedlung in den unteren Ebenen wurden Xenosruinen entdeckt. Späher haben versucht, in sie einzudringen, trafen aber auf den Feind: Schreckliche {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}Xenos{/g} aus Eisen mit langen Klauen entstiegen den dunklen Hallen. Eure Soldaten haben ihren Angriff heldenhaft zurückgeschlagen, bis etwas Unerwartetes passiert ... andere Eisenxenos ohne Klauen kamen und schlachteten ihre Artgenossen ab, anstatt ihnen zu helfen."
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! An urgent dispatch from Zarkov. Xenos ruins have been discovered near a small settlement on the lower levels. Scouts attempted to penetrate them, but were met by the enemy: terrifying iron {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xenos{/g} with long claws emerged from the dark halls. Your soldiers valiantly repelled their assault until something unexpected occurred — other iron xenos appeared, without claws, and instead of aiding their own kind, they began to slaughter them."

traits.locale_text: "Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}! Eine dringende Nachricht von Zarkov. Unweit einer kleinen Siedlung in den unteren Ebenen wurden Xenosruinen entdeckt. Späher haben versucht, in sie einzudringen, trafen aber auf den Feind: Schreckliche {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}Xenos{/g} aus Eisen mit langen Klauen entstiegen den dunklen Hallen. Eure Soldaten haben ihren Angriff heldenhaft zurückgeschlagen, bis etwas Unerwartetes passiert ... andere Eisenxenos ohne Klauen kamen und schlachteten ihre Artgenossen ab, anstatt ihnen zu helfen."

languages.text: "{mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri! Zarkov'dan acil bir mesaj aldık. Alt seviyelerdeki küçük bir yerleşimin yakınında zeno harabeleri keşfedilmiş. Keşif erleri içeri sızmaya çalışınca düşmanla karşılaşmış. Uzun pençeli korkunç demir {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}zenolar{/g}, karanlık koridorlardan çıkmış. Askerleriniz saldırılarını cesurca püskürtmüş ama sonrasında beklenmedik bir şey olmuş... Pençesiz başka demir zenolar belirmiş ve türdeşlerine yardım etmek yerine onları katletmeye başlamışlar."
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! An urgent dispatch from Zarkov. Xenos ruins have been discovered near a small settlement on the lower levels. Scouts attempted to penetrate them, but were met by the enemy: terrifying iron {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xenos{/g} with long claws emerged from the dark halls. Your soldiers valiantly repelled their assault until something unexpected occurred — other iron xenos appeared, without claws, and instead of aiding their own kind, they began to slaughter them."

traits.locale_text: "{mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri! Zarkov'dan acil bir mesaj aldık. Alt seviyelerdeki küçük bir yerleşimin yakınında zeno harabeleri keşfedilmiş. Keşif erleri içeri sızmaya çalışınca düşmanla karşılaşmış. Uzun pençeli korkunç demir {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}zenolar{/g}, karanlık koridorlardan çıkmış. Askerleriniz saldırılarını cesurca püskürtmüş ama sonrasında beklenmedik bir şey olmuş... Pençesiz başka demir zenolar belirmiş ve türdeşlerine yardım etmek yerine onları katletmeye başlamışlar."

languages.text: « Votre Seigneurie ! Nous avons reçu une dépêche urgente de Zarkov. Des ruines xénos ont été découvertes à proximité d'une petite colonie dans les niveaux inférieurs. Des éclaireurs ont tenté d'y pénétrer, mais de terrifiants {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xénos{/g} de fer dotés de longues griffes ont surgi des ténèbres et les ont attaqués. Vos soldats les ont vaillamment repoussés, puis quelque chose d'inattendu s'est produit : d'autres xénos métalliques sont apparus, mais dépourvus de griffes, et au lieu d'aider leurs congénères, ils ont commencé à les massacrer ! »
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! An urgent dispatch from Zarkov. Xenos ruins have been discovered near a small settlement on the lower levels. Scouts attempted to penetrate them, but were met by the enemy: terrifying iron {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xenos{/g} with long claws emerged from the dark halls. Your soldiers valiantly repelled their assault until something unexpected occurred — other iron xenos appeared, without claws, and instead of aiding their own kind, they began to slaughter them."

traits.locale_text: « Votre Seigneurie ! Nous avons reçu une dépêche urgente de Zarkov. Des ruines xénos ont été découvertes à proximité d'une petite colonie dans les niveaux inférieurs. Des éclaireurs ont tenté d'y pénétrer, mais de terrifiants {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xénos{/g} de fer dotés de longues griffes ont surgi des ténèbres et les ont attaqués. Vos soldats les ont vaillamment repoussés, puis quelque chose d'inattendu s'est produit : d'autres xénos métalliques sont apparus, mais dépourvus de griffes, et au lieu d'aider leurs congénères, ils ont commencé à les massacrer ! »
